'''Knezex Hral Piksoar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Drovian]] who lived on the swamp [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nim Drovis]]. He was a direct descendant of [[Garnu Hral Eschen]], who was killed by [[Gopso'o]] warriors. Knezex worked to avenge this [[Death/Legends|death]] by fighting against Gopso'o terrorists.

Knezex worked at the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] base on Nim Drovis and was present when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] dropped off survivors from the ''[[Corbantis]]''.
